title: 'DeFi bent, not broken': Standard Chartered says rsETH episode won't derail path to $2T RWA market
message_html: 'DeFi bent, not broken': Standard Chartered says rsETH episode won't derail path to $2T RWA market ...
snippet: The bank said DeFi’s $300 million-plus rescue effort and structural upgrades reinforce its long-term $2 trillion real-world asset thesis.

title: Visa Adds 5 Blockchains as Stablecoin Settlement Volume Surges
message_html: Visa Adds 5 Blockchains as Stablecoin Settlement Volume Surges ...
snippet: Visa is adding five more blockchains to its global stablecoin settlement pilot, bringing the total number of blockchains it supports to nine. The newly supported blockchains are Arc, Base, Canton, Polygon and Tempo, the company said in a Wednesday (April 29) press release emailed to PYMNTS. They joi

title: Stable Sea taps WisdomTree to bring tokenized Treasury access to small and medium-sized businesses
message_html: Stable Sea taps WisdomTree to bring tokenized Treasury access to small and medium-sized businesses ...
snippet: “We want to be the default for 'money at rest' within the onchain space,” WisdomTree Head of Digital Assets Will Peck said.
